name: agyb-aas-marketing-seo-growth
description: Install the "AAS Marketing, SEO & Growth" workflow plugin from Antigravity Awesome Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, write, measure, test, and improve content, SEO, email, and acquisition workflows.
interface.longDescription: Plan, write, measure, test, and improve content, SEO, email, and acquisition workflows. A clearer proposition than many separate marketing skills: plan, write, measure, test, and improve acquisition work. Recommended for: Founders, Growth teams, Content and SEO operators. Not for: Backend API design, Security assessment. Covers Content Creator, SEO Audit, and 8 more skills.
defaultPrompt: Use this plugin to audit this site for SEO, content, analytics, and conversion opportunities.
Use this plugin to create a growth experiment backlog with measurement and email follow-up.
Use this plugin to plan a programmatic SEO cluster and the tracking needed to evaluate it.
